Tidio

AI customer support agent that handles website chat 24/7.

Category AI Agents
Pricing $29/mo AI-powered
Released 2013
Affiliate Varies
Visit Tidio →

About Tidio

Tidio's AI agent (Lyro) handles customer questions on your website autonomously. It learns from your help docs and FAQs, answers 70%+ of tickets independently, and escalates only when needed. Setup takes 15 minutes — paste one code snippet.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • 15-minute setup
  • Learns from help docs
  • Seamless human handoff
  • Free tier (50 convos/mo)

❌ Cons

  • AI misses nuance sometimes
  • Need $29/mo for serious usage

Best For

Anyone selling products or services online.

Tags

ai agentscustomer supportchatautomation
